chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 800 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.21 & 26 2. For orders on CMA No.4502/2022 3. For hearing of main case 21.10.2025 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question framed for determination has already been decided against the department vide judgment of the honourable Supreme Court reported as 2025 SCMR 728, therefore, in mutatis mutandis application of the aforesaid edict this reference application may be dismissed in limine. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
